author: codex-agent

patch.value: During extension install --gh tests, clone of https://github.com/unbrained/pm-cli.git returned repository not found. Validate canonical GitHub owner/repo references across docs, examples, and error guidance.
Track extension GitHub shorthand source documentation parity
Dogfood run hit repository-not-found for unbrained/pm-cli shorthand; documentation/source examples need verification.
All extension --gh examples reference a reachable canonical repository or explicitly document private-source requirements.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search 'extension github shorthand repository not found' --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new because no active docs task covered this specific shorthand source parity check.

message: Create docs parity follow-up for extension gh shorthand

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Observed failure evidence during dogfood: pm extension --install --gh unbrained/pm-cli/.agents/pm/extensions/todos --project --ref main -> repository not found. Follow-up needed to verify canonical public shorthand examples.
